TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ricky_Blanton, title = Ricky_Blanton, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ricky_Blanton} }

S.FORM: Ricky Blanton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Ricky Blanton, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ricky Blanton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Ricky Blanton, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨkj βlanton s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, riʦ~ʨkj βlanton, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
